name: Boya Mini TX + TX + RX Wireless Microphone for USB Type-C
description: Designed with unmatched portability for the content creator on the go, the black BOYA mini 2-Person Tiny Wireless Microphone System features ultracompact transmitters weighing just 0.2 oz while improving your audio quality in your next vlog or livestream.

features.Key Features: For Content Creation | 2-Person Shoots with Mobile Devices | 2 x Tiny Transmitters with Built-In Mic | Plug-In USB-C Receiver | 328' Transmission Distance | 48 kHz 16-Bit Audio Sampling Rate | 3-Level Noise Cancellation, 120 dB SPL | Three Voice Changer Modes | 6-Hour Battery Life, Charging Case
features.What’s In The Box: BOYA mini 2-Person Tiny Wireless Microphone System with USB-C Connector for Mobile Devices (2.4 GHz, Black) | 2 x Transmitter | Plug-In Receiver (USB-C) | Charging Case | USB-C to USB-A Charging Cable
